notes: Runs every Tube TV item through the same stable MPV lifecycle used by Video on Demand instead of the persistent live-player path.
Restores the compact channel number and name in the top-right while retaining the full controls and stream overlay at the bottom.
Keeps program and commercial transitions black and free of channel overlays.
Requires Tater Tube Server v1.2.11 for Local-style scheduled-item transcoding.
